MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael S. Hunt, Esq. appeared for plaintiff citibank (South Dakota) N.A.
Rhonda Hedges, Litigation Analyst for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Albert L. Boasbert, Esq. appeared with defendant Julie S. Matthews, who was placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 25, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 21, 2009.
Cross-Complaint of Julie S. Matthews was dismissed today, December 21, 2009.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Hunt. In accordance with the terms of the settlement, defendant Julie S. Matthews shall pay plaintiff the sum of $15,400.00 as follows: $1,000.00 on or before 1/8/10. Commencing 2/1/10, and continuing through 1/1/11, defendant shall pay plaintiff $200.00 per month. Commencing 2/1/11, and continuing through 1/1/13, defendant shall pay plaintiff $300.00 per month. Commencing 2/1/13, defendant shall pay plaintiff $400.00 per month until the outstanding balance is paid in full. If defendant July S. Matthews fails to make any of her monthly payments, plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A. may, up Ex Parte application with forty-eight notice to defendant's counsel, obtain judgment in the amount of $17,177.85, less all payments made to date.

Defendant was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and her understanding of this agreement. The Court shall retain jurisdiction to enforce this settlement agreement pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 664.6. General Release pursuant to Civil Code Section 1542 applies.

Matter is continued to March 5, 2013 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calender.

Agreement of the parties was accepted by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft To Respond To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
Off Calendar Jun-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE - TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Citibank South Dakota's Motion To Compel Defendant To Respond To Request For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $410, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. EVERETT A. HEWLETT
